name: @joecardoso13/slack
description: MCP server for the Slack API

api_key.title: Slack Bot Token
api_key.description: Your Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) from https://api.slack.com/apps

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or DM

tools.name: reply_to_thread
tools.description: Reply to a specific message thread

tools.name: create_channel
tools.description: Create a new public or private channel

tools.name: get_channel_history
tools.description: Read recent messages from a channel

tools.name: get_thread_replies
tools.description: Read all replies in a thread

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Look up a user's profile details

tools.name: add_reaction
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message
